management.description: Add, sort and edit items with intuitive controls in one menu workflow built for day-to-day operations.

analytics.title: Online Menu Analytics
analytics.description: Track QR scans and menu views. Paid plans unlock charts and rankings by language and device.

templates.title: Flexible Templates
templates.description: Multiple design templates, fully customizable. Change colors, fonts and backgrounds to match your brand.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Online Menu
multilingual.description: Auto-translated by AI trained on culinary context. Enable or disable languages anytime and fine-tune any translation manually.

media.title: Optimized media delivery
media.description: Attach photos to each dish from the admin, with sensible file limits so your menu stays quick to load on phones.

currency.title: Multi-Currency Menu
currency.description: Show prices in multiple currencies at once. Add several prices per dish for portions, sizes or alternative currencies.

qr.title: QR Code Menu Generator
qr.description: Generate and export QR codes as PNG, SVG or PDF. Paid plans unlock branding and saved designs.

Templates.title: Menu designs & templates
Templates.subtitle: Classic, Modern and Grid mirror what guests see on their phones — filters, languages and layout — before you tune colors and typography to your brand.

Trust.title: Why restaurants trust Menuly
Trust.intro: Menuly combines design quality, speed and operational control so your digital menu matches the experience you deliver in venue.
highlights: Clear plans for each stage: Free, Starter and Pro
Fast launch from an admin built for real operations
Progressive scaling without friction or technical overhead

items.title: AI translation with editorial control

items.title: Brand-aligned templates
items.description: Choose a layout and fine-tune colors, typography and density for a consistent visual identity.

items.title: Production-ready QR exports
items.description: Export QR in PNG, SVG and PDF, with branding options on paid plans for visual consistency.

items.title: Multi-currency for mixed audiences
items.description: Show multiple currencies on paid plans and improve price clarity for both local and international guests.

items.title: Custom domain when your brand needs it
items.description: Start on short system domains and move to a custom domain on Pro as your brand grows.

items.q: What is a digital QR menu?
items.a: A digital QR menu is an online version of your restaurant menu accessible by scanning a QR code. Customers view it on their mobile devices.

items.q: How much does the subscription cost?
items.a: Menuly offers a Free plan to get started and Starter/Pro plans from €9.99/month to unlock advanced capabilities.

items.q: Can I use my own subdomain?
items.a: Yes — pick a unique slug under one of our short domains (e.g. 'cafe.menuly.app') for an elegant, easy-to-remember address.
Yes. On Starter and Pro, your menu can be translated with AI and fine-tuned manually whenever you need.
Yes, you have full control. Pick a responsive template and customize colors, typography and layout density to match your brand.

items.q: Is there a limit on views or traffic?
items.a: No limits. Every plan includes unlimited views, scans and interactions with no extra charges.

items.q: What happens if I stop my subscription?
items.a: Your menu stays online for a grace period. After that, your subdomain becomes available again.
Listing allergens helps guests avoid harmful ingredients. Some templates allow filtering items by allergen.

items.q: Can I change my domain later?
items.a: Yes — anytime. Note that previously printed QR codes will still point to the old domain, so you'll need to print new ones.

items.q: Can I create multiple QR codes?
items.a: Yes, unlimited. Customize colors, logos and styles. All QR codes lead to your resource page.

domain.title: Personalized QR menu domain
domain.hero: A short, memorable subdomain for your restaurant
domain.description: Pick from a curated set of short root domains and combine them with your brand to create a personal web address for your QR menu. No registrations, no delays — go live the moment you choose your slug.
bullets: Short root domains to choose from
Fast slug setup and availability check
Change your slug anytime (legacy QR codes keep redirecting)

management.title: Easy online menu management
management.hero: Build and update your menu in minutes, not hours
management.description: Add categories and items with intuitive drag-and-drop controls, reorder dishes with a click, and let our AI photo-parsing assistant turn an existing PDF or photo into a structured menu in seconds.
bullets: AI menu extraction from photos & PDFs

analytics.title: Online menu analytics
analytics.hero: Real insights about how guests use your menu
analytics.description: See QR scans, page views, language preferences, devices and returning visitors in clean, real-time charts. Use the data to optimize your menu, understand peak hours, and prove ROI.
bullets: Scans & views by day, week and month
Language ranking — know what your guests prefer
Returning visitors and average session duration

templates.title: Flexible templates for online menu
templates.hero: Beautiful, responsive templates that match your brand
templates.description: Pick from our curated library of templates, then customize colors, typography, hero imagery and section layouts. Every template is mobile-first, fast, and accessible by default.

multilingual.title: Multilingual online menu
multilingual.hero: Translated by AI trained on culinary context
multilingual.description: Your menu is automatically translated into selected languages by an AI fine-tuned on dishes, ingredients and cooking techniques. Enable or disable languages anytime, and override any translation manually.
bullets: 25+ languages including Catalan, Korean and Hindi
Inline manual overrides per dish or category
Locale switcher built into every template

media.title: Optimized media
media.description: Every uploaded image is optimized for lighter delivery. Pro unlocks CDN transforms and responsive WebP variants.

currency.title: Multi-currency menu
currency.hero: Show prices in multiple currencies, all at once
currency.description: Support guests from anywhere. Configure several currencies on your menu and add multiple prices per dish for portions, sizes or alternative currencies — perfect for tourist areas and flexible pricing.
bullets: Multiple prices per dish (portions, sizes, currencies)

qr.title: QR code menu generator
qr.hero: Print-ready QR codes that actually look on-brand
qr.description: Customize your QR codes with your logo, brand colors and unique eye styles, then export print-ready PNG, SVG or PDF. Save multiple designs per resource and reprint anytime.
bullets: Save and reuse multiple QR designs
Export PNG, SVG and print-ready PDF
